// Generated by xlsynth::aot_builder from build spec "add_inputs"
// (top="add_inputs", function="add_inputs").

unsafe extern "C" {
    #[link_name = "add_inputs"]
    fn __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_add_inputs();
}

const ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO: &[u8] = include_bytes!("add_inputs.entrypoints.pb");
const INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[1, 1];
const INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[1, 1];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[1];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[1];

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Token {}

pub type Bits8 = u8;

pub type Input0 = Bits8;
pub type Input1 = Bits8;

pub type Output = Bits8;

const INPUT0_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] =
    &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    }];
const INPUT1_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] =
    &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    }];
const OUTPUT0_LAYOUT: &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout] =
    &[xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 0,
        data_size: 1,
        padded_size: 1,
    }];

fn encode_input_0(_value: &Input0, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 1);
    dst.fill(0);
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &(_value).to_ne_bytes());
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 1);
}

fn encode_input_1(_value: &Input1, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 1);
    dst.fill(0);
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(dst, &INPUT1_LAYOUT[0usize], &(_value).to_ne_bytes());
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT1_LAYOUT.len(), 1);
}

fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 1);
    let output: Output = {
        let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
        xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &mut dst_bytes);
        let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
        decoded
    };
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 1);
    output
}

pub fn descriptor() -> xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor<'static> {
    unsafe {
        xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor::from_raw_parts_unchecked(
            ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO,
            __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_add_inputs as *const () as usize,
            xlsynth::AotEntrypointMetadata {
                symbol: "add_inputs".to_string(),
                input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                temp_buffer_size: 0,
                temp_buffer_alignment: 1,
            },
        )
    }
}

pub struct Runner {
    inner: xlsynth::AotRunner<'static>,
}

impl Runner {
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: xlsynth::AotRunner::new(descriptor())?,
        })
    }

    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
        a: &Input0,
        b: &Input1,
    ) -> Result<xlsynth::AotRunResult<Output>, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(a, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        encode_input_1(b, self.inner.input_mut(1));
        self.inner.run_with_events(|inner| {
            let output = decode_output_0(inner.output(0));
            output
        })
    }

    pub fn run(&mut self, a: &Input0, b: &Input1) -> Result<Output, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(a, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        encode_input_1(b, self.inner.input_mut(1));
        self.inner.run()?;
        let output = decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0));
        Ok(output)
    }
}

pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
    Runner::new()
}
